## Summary

Describe the change and rationale.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run build` and `pnpm run test` pass locally (CI runs the same)
- [ ] I updated documentation as needed (README/CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] I avoided logging secrets or sensitive values
- [ ] _(Optional)_ I ran a smoke test in GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, or Bitbucket Pipelines when changing CI-specific behavior
